A small corporation on [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]], '''Aquatic Integrated Systems''' ('''AIS''') produced a variety of aquacultured [[Fish/Legends|fish]] and plants from the [[Elkit Peninsula]]. The company was owned by a group of [[Herglic/Legends|Herglics]] and was the primary producer of [[salar]] on Kothlis, a type of fish originally found only on [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] but brought to Kothlis by the company.

{{Company-stub}}
